summary: Retested badge-unlock confetti fix in KidHome.js pickMood. CONFIRMED FIXED. Confetti overlay renders 32 emoji <span> children inside <div class='pointer-events-none fixed inset-0 z-[80] overflow-hidden'> on first mood check-in of a fresh child. Stars increased to 2 in header; mood reply shows. Overlay auto-dismisses (spans=0 after ~2.6s) and does not block subsequent tile clicks. Prayer Corner and God's Promises tile navigation both work post-confetti.
critical_code_review_comments: KidHome.js pickMood (lines 42-50): fix is correct - prevBadges captured before POST, setCelebrate(true) only when (data.child.badges).length > prevBadges. Verified working.
Confetti.js: pointer-events-none + z-[80] confirmed; cleanup setTimeout fires onDone at 2.6s; after dismissal, overlay is empty (spans=0) so tile clicks proceed normally.
Minor: pickMood does not handle the (unlikely) case where backend response is missing data.child - silently does nothing on error catch which is acceptable but could log to user as toast.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (3/3: confetti trigger + Prayer tile + Promises tile)

test_credentials: parent@brighterdayz.org / Sunshine123 (no PIN gate triggered on this run)
seed_data_creation: Created one fresh child profile (e.g. ConfT94710) under demo parent to ensure stars start at 0 and first_step badge fires. Can be removed via Parent Dashboard trash icon.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Badge-unlock confetti bug from iteration_4 is fully resolved. Verified DOM contains div.fixed.pointer-events-none.z-[80] with 32 <span> emoji children within <200ms of clicking any mood-* button when badges count increases. Overlay self-dismisses (~2.6s). Stars header increments (1 streak / 2 stars after first check-in). Regression on tile-prayer and tile-promises also clean.
rca of the issue: Previous RCA: setCelebrate never called. Applied fix in KidHome.js pickMood now diffs badge count (prevBadges vs data.child.badges) and triggers setCelebrate(true) on growth. Reproduction confirms fix: fresh child + mood-grateful => stars 0->2, first_step badge granted, confetti overlay with 32 emoji spans rendered immediately and dismissed after 2.6s.
